enhancement_queue.recommendation: Rotate at 5 MB. Also fix the root cause: add SO_REUSEADDR to the TCPServer or use a process manager that waits for port release before restart.
Review scoring thresholds in seller_distress.py. Either lower the qualifying bar (min_score=60 may be too high) or enrich lead data with additional di
Add a lightweight pre-check before spawning full agent session. If no alerts/actions needed, skip the expensive LLM call. Or reduce frequency to hourl
Update all job payload.model fields from 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001' to the allowed model in agents.defaults.model.primary, or add haiku to allowed mo
Consolidate into one job or stagger them. Running both at 3PM doubles API costs and creates race conditions in ActiveCampaign uploads.
Move API keys to environment variables or a secrets manager. Remove from cron job payload text where they are visible in logs and run history.
Evaluate if browser automation is still needed. If only used occasionally, launch on-demand rather than keeping persistent. Could reclaim 1 GB RAM.
Disable until root cause is fixed. Currently burning API credits every run cycle for zero value.
Re-enable Escalation Alerter or build lightweight consecutive-error detection into the gateway. Alert on consecErrors >= 2.
Rename workspace directory to remove the API key from the path. Update all references in openclaw.json.
